summary: Normalizes Gong call metadata, attendee context, and action items into a canonical source_record for meeting and briefing workflows.

required_env.name: MEETING_SOURCE_API_BASE_URL
required_env.description: Base URL for Gong or the customer proxy endpoint.

required_env.name: MEETING_SOURCE_TOKEN
required_env.description: Access token used to pull meeting metadata and transcript summaries.

mapping_files.purpose: Maps Gong call IDs, attendee lists, summaries, and action items into canonical meeting source_record fields.

fixtures.notes: Meeting with clear account association, transcript summary, and follow-up actions.
